cwd.description: Working directory; defaults to the engine process's cwd.

fallback_models.description:
Session-level default fallback chain (see
[`TurnOptions::fallback_models`]); used by every turn on this session
that doesn't set its own `TurnOptions.fallback_models`.

isolation.description:
Requested isolation posture for this session. `None` defers to the
engine/role default. Only honored for root sessions; subagents inherit
their parent's working directory.

reuse_workspace_id.description:
Reuse an existing provisioned workspace by id on first prompt rather
than creating a new one. Honored only when [`Self::isolation`] resolves
to a policy that wants isolation and only on the deferred first-turn
provisioning path (subagents inherit their parent's cwd and ignore
this). `None` = provision fresh.

role.description:
Role this root session runs as (e.g. `searcher`). Selects the role's
tool profile and model chain; `None` = the main role. Unknown role
names are rejected at session creation.

IsolationPolicy.description:
Whether a root session runs inside an isolated working copy, and how
strictly that is required.

oneOf.description: Never isolate; the session works directly in the base directory.

Isolate when possible; fall back to the base directory (with a warning)
if a workspace can't be provisioned.

Isolation is mandatory; session creation fails if a workspace can't be
provisioned.

ModelRef.description:
Reference to a model, optionally provider-qualified:
`"anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5"` or a bare `"claude-sonnet-4-5"`.

PermissionMode.description: How the engine treats tool calls that would normally ask the user.

oneOf.description: Ask on anything not covered by a rule.
Auto-allow file edits (the `Fs` category); ask for the rest.
Deny all mutating tools; read-only research still runs.
Never ask: deny anything that would prompt.
Allow everything. Requires an explicit opt-in flag on the runner.
